name: scaffold-dag-required-reads
description: Workflow-guide scaffold: nested DAG with outputFrom plus downstream inputPolicy.requiredReads. Copy before adapting.

stages.prompt: Summarize the runtime task for the nested DAG analysis. Do not modify files. Put machine-readable JSON in <control> with schema, digest, taskSummary, scope, and constraints. Put detailed notes in <analysis> and structured evidence references in <refs>.

Scan the repository or provided context for facts relevant to the intake task. Do not modify files. Put machine-readable JSON in <control> with schema, digest, scanSummary, evidence, and openQuestions. Put detailed observations in <analysis>.

After scan completes, perform an independent read-only review of the same runtime task. This ordering edge does not provide scan artifacts; do not assume scan details unless independently observed. Put machine-readable JSON in <control> with schema, digest, reviewSummary, risks, and confidence.

Use Source Stage Context from scan and review to synthesize the nested DAG analysis. Do not modify files. Put machine-readable JSON in <control> with schema, digest, conclusion, supportingPoints, limitations, and nextSteps. Put the detailed synthesis in <analysis>.

Produce the final report for the runtime task. Before final output, read the required workflow artifact analysis.final.analysis using workflow_artifact; the workflow will fail closed if that read is not proven. Use Source Stage Context and the required artifact contents. Do not modify files. Put machine-readable JSON in <control> with schema, digest, verdict, summary, requiredArtifactUsed, and followUps.
